firstSupportedPlatform.note: The Apple Silicon bundle still uses stand-in sidecars until npm run record:release-sidecar-checksums and npm run fetch:release-sidecars succeed against the pinned upstream release executables.

note: Real upstream intake is not complete until npm run record:release-sidecar-checksums refreshes the pinned checksum map and npm run fetch:release-sidecars succeeds against the published upstream executables.
